_readme: Reference catalog of every non-private voice available across this app's TTS engines.
'Private' voices (ElevenLabs category=cloned — family voice clones) are deliberately excluded.
usedInApp flags whether the app's own code currently references that exact voice id/name anywhere.
To add a voice by hand: append an object to the matching engine's `voices` array (or a new entry
under manualAdditions if it's from an engine not listed below) using the same field shape as its
neighbors. Fields you don't have data for can be set to null — nothing here is enforced by a schema.

Each voice's castingProfile is an assessed layer (pitch/pace/energy/texture/suggestedArchetypes) using the same rubric as this app's own runtime voice-casting prompt (characterProfiler.ts) -- derived from each engine's real published signals, not measured audio. See each entry's castingProfile.assessedBy for provenance (Claude judgment vs. this app's own hand-tuned config).

sources.geminiTts: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/speech-generation (no live list-voices API; verified against docs)
sources.googleCloudTts: GET https://texttospeech.googleapis.com/v1/voices (live query, filtered to en-US Chirp3-HD + he-IL WaveNet)

engines.notes: Google's fixed 30-voice prebuilt catalog. No accent/age/gender metadata from the API itself — style descriptor is Google's own one-word tag per voice. Auto-detects input language (100+ languages); output is 24kHz PCM/WAV.

engines.notes: Live query of this account's voice library, excluding category=cloned (private family voice clones). 'premade' = ElevenLabs' own stock voices; 'professional' = added to this account from ElevenLabs' public Voice Library (sharing.status=copied) — still public voices, not private recordings.

engines.notes: Full catalog has 2066 voices across 40+ locales; scoped here to what this app actually configures (Chirp3-HD for en-US locale-agnostic resolution, WaveNet for he-IL — see resolveGCVoiceName() in src/lib/services/ttsService.ts). Used only as a fallback when GOOGLE_CLOUD_TTS_API_KEY is set.

castingProfile.assessedBy: Claude (LLM judgment from the engine's real signals — name/labels/style tag/gender; not measured from audio, no acoustic-analysis tool exists here)
castingProfile.note: Inherited from the Gemini TTS assessment for the same voice name (Google Cloud's Chirp3-HD tier shares voice names with Gemini's native TTS catalog; not officially confirmed to be the identical underlying model, but the shared naming is a strong signal).

manualAdditions._instructions: Add voices here for engines not covered above, or ones you've found manually. Example shape below — delete or overwrite it.

example.name: Example Name
example.notes: Whatever you know about it — gender, accent, style, where it's used, a preview URL, etc.
